productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Teal Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Teal blue knitted polo T-shirt, has a contrast woven checked button-down collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a brand print detail on the right sleeve, a contrast-lined short button placket on the front, contrast embroidered branding on the left side of the chest, stitch detail along the side seams, has a vented hemline with the back hem longer than the front
